title: Machine-Generated Text Detection
description: Machine-generated text detection task requiring annotators to classify whether a given text was written by a human, generated by a machine, contains mixed authorship, or is uncertain. Based on SemEval-2024 Task 8.
citation:
@inproceedings{wang-etal-2024-machine-generated-text,
    title = "Multigenerator, Multidomain, and Multilingual Black-Box Machine-Generated Text Detection",
    author = "Wang, Yuxia and others",
    booktitle = "Proceedings of the 18th International Workshop on Semantic Evaluation (SemEval-2024)",
    year = "2024",
    publisher = "Association for Computational Linguistics"
}
